name: Party Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Mix the gingersnap and Graham cracker crumbs with the margarine until combined.
3. Lightly coat a nonstick pie pan (10-inch) with cooking spray.
4. Press the crumb mixture into the bottom of the pie pan and bake for 7 minutes.
- The crust will be partially baked.
5. Let cool on a wire rack. Keep the oven on.
6. Whisk together all filling ingredients until well blended.
7. Pour the mixture into the partially baked crust.
8. Bake for an additional 40 to 50 minutes, or until the center is set and does not jiggle when gently shaken with an oven mitt.
9. Let cool on a wire rack.
10. Carefully cut into 10 wedges and serve.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 1/2 STARCH/BREAD Exchange + 1/2 FAT Exchange
CAL: 136; TOTAL FAT: 3g; SAT FAT: 1g; CHO: 26g; SODIUM: 141mg; CARBOHYDRATES: 26g; SUGARS: 18g; PROTEIN: 5g
